# Andrés M. Prieto

> Senior Software Engineer specializing in AI infrastructure, GNU/Linux and fullstack development. Based in Colombia, ~10 years of experience.

## About

Currently a Senior Software Engineer at DailyBot, building AI infrastructure and integrating language models into production developer tools. Works across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, GNU/Linux, Docker and AWS, with a focus on AI agents, RAG pipelines and local-first AI tooling. Active open-source contributor and conference speaker.

## Key projects

- Lyra (https://andresmpa.netlify.app/en/projects/lyra) — Local AI assistant for GNU/Linux.
- Writing Lab (https://andresmpa.netlify.app/en/projects/writing-lab) — JavaScript/Vue.js/PostgreSQL project.
- dotfiles (https://github.com/AndresMpa/dotfiles) — Full Linux system configuration.
